request_payload.exposure_text: As a senior citizen who remembers the Cold War, I'm deeply concerned about our national security. Why risk weakening those bonds when we face so many uncertainties? Let's not gamble with our safety just to make a political point. #NationalSecurityFirst #ThinkBeforeYouLeap
